Title of Work: The My Penny’s Worth × My Two Cents™ Strategic Communication Architecture Type of Work: Original Literary Work / Authored Methodology Author: Roger Rohan Anglin (UK Citizen) – Sole author, full rights retained Completion Year: 2025 Description: This is a structured communication system authored by Roger Rohan Anglin, consisting of original phrase constructions, strategic voice methodology, and a transformation directive.
